properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: … Who can endure on the day of Your coming Who will be able to stand You will return like refiner's fire Who will be saved by Your hand

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: … You make a way by the blood of Your sacrifice Poured out on Calvary's tree Now in Your presence Your glory and righteousness Stir up a passion in me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: … The fire of Your love is burning within me Consuming my heart Restoring my soul My only desire to abide in Your holiness Here in the fire of Your love Here in the fire of Your love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: … Though You were blameless You laid down Your life for us Bearing the weight of our sin Come with the power that raised You victorious Pour out Your presence again

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: … The fire of Your love is burning within me Consuming my heart You're restoring my soul My only desire to abide in Your holiness

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Here in the fire of Your love Here in the fire of Your love … Here in the fire of Your love Here in the fire of Your love
